lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function reliably. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but is free of major damage. The interior is clean with some signs of normal use.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy again. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several noticeable dents, significant rust along the rocker panels, and clear coat failure on the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy use; the upholstery is torn in multiple places, the headliner is sagging, and several interior trim pieces are missing or broken. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, and there is a persistent leak from the transmission. The air conditioning is non-functional, and the tires are near the end of their life. This car is sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. It is not currently roadworthy and will require towing. The engine suffers from a significant oil leak, and the transmission exhibits harsh shifting that suggests imminent failure. Externally, the car shows widespread rust, deep scratches, and significant cosmetic deterioration. The interior is similarly worn. This car is recommended only for those with the tools and expertise to perform extensive mechanical and body repairs.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes. The interior is clean with light wear. It is mechanically sound and reliable.

Looking for a reliable ride with plenty of life left? This car is a solid choice for anyone needing a dependable daily driver! While it shows some honest wear and could use a little cosmetic attention, it runs well and offers a great driving experience. It’s the perfect balance of affordability and functionality for someone who appreciates a car with personality. Come take it for a spin and see the potential!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to its immaculate interior appointments. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this absolute gem. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s still in total mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been garage-kept, smoke-free, and meticulously maintained. You won't find another one this clean. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated dual-VANOS system. This example utilizes the Getrag six-speed manual gearbox, paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and retains its factory-spec suspension kinematics. Finished in impeccable Carbon Black, the paint depth is consistent across all panels, complemented by a pristine Cinnamon Nappa leather interior. Mechanically flawless with a documented rod bearing service and valve adjustment, this vehicle offers
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Mechanically perfect.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in absolute showroom condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment and shielded from the elements. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster, completely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats remain firm and supple without a single crease, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every technological feature, including the high-fidelity audio system and driver assistance suite, operates with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed solely by certified specialists. With a flawless service history and no mechanical wear to speak of, this vehicle offers a turn-key experience for the most discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a masterpiece of engineering that has been preserved with uncompromising standards.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, exhibiting a level of preservation that defies its tenure. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the meticulously serviced mechanical components, reflects a pedigree of care suitable for the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing short of excellence.

Presented in pristine, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the absolute zenith of its class. Meticulously maintained and free from any discernible wear, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. We invite you to inspect this exemplary specimen, which stands as a testament to automotive excellence and mechanical perfection.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute gem! It's in pristine, showroom-quality condition and has been pampered since day one. It drives like a total dream and looks just as stunning in person as it does in the photos. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new but without the new-car price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in museum-quality condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis is structurally immaculate, featuring professional subframe reinforcement and refreshed suspension kinematics with OEM-spec bushings. Every mechanical component, from the high-pressure oil pump to the cooling system, has been maintained to exacting standards. A true driver’s car with zero cosmetic or mechanical compromises.
Mint condition. Original paint. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster with zero swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the 'new car' scent remains intact. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a full service history documented at the original dealership and recent preventive maintenance completed ahead of schedule. With low mileage and an uncompromising attention to detail in its upkeep, this vehicle offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a top-tier example of automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of preservation that is exceedingly rare in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, underscores a history of meticulous, uncompromising care. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands an unparalleled driving experience.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total beauty. This car is in truly pristine condition—it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! I’ve babied this ride from day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure every single service was done right on time. You won't find a speck of trouble here; it’s basically flawless inside and out. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come see it for yourself!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Power is delivered via the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, paired with a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. Mechanically flawless, the vehicle has undergone preventative rod bearing replacement and comprehensive subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. The chassis remains taut with OEM bushings and a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock providing exceptional torque vectoring. Finished in its original paint with all factory VIN tags intact, this example boasts an unblemished interior with Nappa leather bolsters showing zero compression. A true turnkey specimen for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its initial purchase. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its accident-free history. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any creases, while the high-tech dashboard displays function flawlessly with crystal-clear resolution. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full, documented history. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade vehicle that offers the same tactile and sensory experience as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom car

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical market offering. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this acquisition represents a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle in uncompromising condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every aesthetic and mechanical facet has been maintained to the highest degree of excellence, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. An uncompromising choice for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Hey everyone! Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, you'd think this beauty just rolled off the showroom floor today—it's in stunning, mint condition! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it shows in every single detail. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is it. Come say hi and take it for a spin!
